title: 20'' Fairy Light Spirit Easter Tree,108 LED Warm White Light Starry Copper String Tree Lamp USB or Battery Operated Bedside Lamp, Tree Branch Lights Decor for Easter Decoration
features: 【Tabletop Christmas Tree Lamp】The Copper Wire String Lights with 108 LED light beads. Light color: warm white light. Total height about 20 inches (50 cm) with a base of 4.72 inches (12cm). Measure the size manually, please allow an error of 1-2 cm.

【Specification】Firefly Copper String Tree Lights; 3 AA batteries&USB plug in powered, (battery not included); ON/OFF touch switch on the pedestal, plastic pedestal can be removed, steady on mode; LED copper wire light source, NOT waterproof.

【Adjustable Branches】You can twist and shape every branch on the tree to design the shape you like, injecting your personal style into the table lamp. The gorgeous birch tree light will provide with a sense of tranquility in your home.

【SAFE AND WIDELY USE】: The small christmas tree lights are low heat generating, durable, safe to touch when illuminated. Perfect for your bedroom, living room, dining room, kids room, aisle, garden for christmas, halloween,Ireland St Patrick ′ s Day,Valentine's Day, Christmas, Carnival,thanksgiving birthday, wedding, party decorations.

【WE ARE HERE For YOU】: Each lighted tree for decoration inside was checked carefully before shipping to guarantee the quality of the tree lights, If you have any problem, please feel free to contact us, we will reply you get back to you within 24 hours.
description: Delicate LED Starry Copper Tree Light ! An Attention Grabber : Warm white shine battery table tree light, 3 kinds of styles, fairy copper string design, elegant appearance. Just put it on your bookshelf, dresser or bedside. Nice everyday home decor. Random Combination: Branches are flexible and easy to bend, convenient installation and movement. Can be displayed standalone or combined with other pieces to create a warm and romantic atmosphere. Versatile: Exquisite gifts for kids children friends girls or family etc. Special decorations for bedroom, birthday, wedding, party and so on. Easy to Use : It requires 3 X AA batteries or USB plug, on/off switch on the pedestal, freestanding. package: 1 *Pearl Bonsai Tree Light 108 * LED light (pearl decoration) 1 USB 1 * exquisite gift box
